rubrics.name: Clarity of Problem Framing
rubrics.description: How well the challenge, context, and constraints are understood and articulated.

rubrics.name: Goals & Success Measures
rubrics.description: Definition of outcomes, metrics, and non-functional expectations.

rubrics.name: Solution Design
rubrics.description: Quality, structure, and completeness of the proposed architecture and flows.

rubrics.name: Use of AI & Automation
rubrics.description: Appropriateness of AI vs non-AI choices, with clear reasoning and balance.

rubrics.name: Decision Rationale
rubrics.description: Justification of key design choices, with logical traceability.

rubrics.name: Presentation & Clarity
rubrics.description: Clarity, professionalism, and effectiveness in conveying the solution.
